meta.note: Twitch raw-audio transcription is not available in this pipeline; stream content is sourced from Theo’s YouTube uploads, which carry auto-generated transcripts.

highlights.title: Prime Day deal-hunting thread
highlights.detail: Called this year’s Amazon Prime Day front page "absolute slop," used Codex to dig out real deals. Top picks: GMKtec mini PC (32GB/2TB for $750), GL.iNet remote KVM, Breville Smart Oven Air Fryer Pro ($320).

highlights.title: Fable (Mythos) model still banned
highlights.detail: Continued the running saga — publicly asked Anthropic "when are we getting Fable back?" Still not restored after a week+.

highlights.title: Gave away a list of app/startup ideas
highlights.detail: "I have a lot of ideas. I wish I could build them all... decided to give them all away in hopes of someone else building them." Joked he could have charged $5k each.

highlights.title: Codex praise
highlights.detail: Despite frequently dunking on it: "I know I dunk on Codex a lot but man this is actually magic."

highlights.title: Looking for a new podcast cohost
highlights.detail: Openly asked followers for cohost recommendations.

highlights.title: Late-night stream
highlights.detail: Announced a late stream and apologized for the recent slowdown in streams/videos.

highlights.title: Misc commentary
highlights.detail: #keep4o / "AI psychosis" snark; "Google can’t help but snatch defeat from the jaws of victory"; gstack as a "new paradigm" (via @davis).

topTweets.text:
Weirdest Amazon Prime day to date. Front page is full of absolute slop. Had to spend hours digging and filtering to find the best deals (thank you Codex)

Dropping best deals I found here for y'all. I personally bought or already own every product I share here.
Hey @claude when are we getting Fable back?
Google can’t help but snatch defeat from the jaws of victory
I know I dunk on Codex a lot but man this is actually magic. https://t.co/Lhq8bOQ3e3

I have a lot of ideas. I wish I could build them all. I don't have the time.

I decided to give them all away in hopes of someone else building them. https://t.co/INF3vBcPxI
Did you know it’s possible to summon hundreds of people with crippling AI psychosis on this site? All you have to do is add a hashtag to your post. #keep4o
“All jokes aside, I do think gstack is a new paradigm” - @davis7

Oh shit this is an underrated one. GL iNet's KVM.

HDMI + USB C to control any computer remotely. They also have a $30 "finger bot" that will press the power button for you. Super helpful for remote agent PCs. I have 3.

https://t.co/ASRgZbAEB8 https://t.co/mxskJHA8Dx

Breville Smart Oven Air Fryer Pro - $320 ($80 off)

My roommate bought this.

"but why does it say purchased twice"

I liked it so much I stole it when he moved out, so bought him a new one. Then I bought one for my family for when I visit them lol.

https://t.co/WoAbCallrd https://t.co/6fs3cI50mQ

GMKtec mini pc with 32gb ram 2tb ssd for $750 (over $200 off)

Man this one hurts a little. I bought the 1tb for $740 last week and it arrived yesterday. The barebones (no ram no ssd) version is $400, so you're paying $350 for the ram and SSD. The SSD is worth that much alone https://t.co/xXBsRloOI9
Unrelated, looking for a new podcast cohost. Got any recommendations?
Y’all down for a late stream in an hour or so?

videos.title: It’s time to go bigger
videos.summary: Based on his CascadiaJS talk. Argues AI hasn’t shrunk the work — it expanded what’s worth building. Reframes engineers’ fear of AI as opportunity: the same task taking 10–15h instead of 100s of hours means you should build bigger, more ambitious things. Mindset over specific tools.

videos.title: I guess we’re writing loops now?
videos.summary: On agentic "loops" — designing loops that prompt your agents instead of prompting agents directly. References the Ralph loop. Loops massively increase throughput but also error rate; he walks through how he keeps quality up (e.g. second-opinion passes with Opus).

videos.title: Fable is Mythos, and it is really good.
videos.summary: Reveals that the "Fable" model is Mythos, and praises it heavily for coding and data analysis — the model at the center of the later ban saga.
